characters.description: Archie Archieis a toy dog that appeared inRoll Over Archie. He is seen in the form of a Scottish Terrier, hence he speaks with a Scottish accent.

characters.name: Baby Whale
characters.description: The Baby Whaleis a adult whale who only appeared in the Season 3 episode "The Beached Whale". She is a bleached whale, which is surprising because she is purple. She is very happy and is smiling, perhaps ignorant to the fact that whales will typically die shortly after becoming beached. She dies shortly after she is found. Maggie vows revenge and thus begins the series long running subtle nod to the 2017 crime film, Sleepless (aka Black Taken), starring Jamie Foxx. "This was supposed to be an easy grab"

characters.name: Big Duck
characters.description: The Big Duckis a very large duck who lives in theRiver of Dreams.Beastused to be afraid of Big Duck, since she had never seen a creature larger than herself, but when they got to know each other they became good friends. Stupid big duck. I calling him name by switch he's vowels >:) The Big Duck is obviously very large. He swan looking kinda like. he has soft white feathers and a yellow beak. Her eyes are black. The Big Duck has two wings and big webbed feet. The Big Duck has appeared in many episodes of Maggie and the Ferocious Beast. Her first appearance was in the episodeThe Big Duck.

characters.name: Dr. Mousenhouse
characters.description: This is the Dr. House of the Maggie and the Ferocious Beast cannon. He first appeared inThe Big Cheese. He has made several key diagnoses of Rudy, including thing such as the common cold, and being annoying. Much like the real Dr. House, Dr. Mousenhouse is at times unorthodox in his approach. He once prescribed that Hamilton beat Rudy with a hammer to cure him of fleas, and it worked!

characters.name: Ferocious Beast
characters.description: The Ferocious Beastis one of the three main protagonists in the series, but contrary to his name, the Ferocious Beast is not very ferocious nor frightening, however he can shout very loud, but still is not scary, although the beast has a very big and bold appearance, he is very kind, gentle, childish, soft and sensitive on the inside, but the Ferocious Beast loves many kinds of food, but really loves pumpkins and finds a large pumpkin patch in Nowhere Land and he also loves baths and Hamilton's cooking, but Maggie and Hamilton are the Ferocious Beast's best friends and the Ferocious Beast is warm and cuddly, like a dog. ﻿The Ferocious Beast, who, ironically, is not ferocious at all, is a main character in theMaggie and the Ferocious Beasttelevision series, the Beast is not very scary or ferocious, however, he can shout louder than anybody, he is yellow, with big red removable spots, and three horns on his head, his favorite catchphrase is "Great googly moogly!", which he says several times per episode, he is just a big softy, despite his bold appearance, the Beast loves pumpkins, which is convenient since there is an impressive pumpkin patch in Nowhere Land, as a matter of fact, Beast loves pretty much any kind of food and is almost always hungry, he even loves baths. He loves Hamilton's cooking. Maggie and Hamilton are his best friends. He wears multi-colored galoshes which he pronounces as "Goo-loshes", Hamilton always corrects him about the pronunciation, but he doesn't believe him.

characters.name: Hamilton Hocks
characters.description: Hamilton Hocksis a pig who has somewhat of a dominant personality, which can lead him to act bossy at times. However, underneath, Hamilton is kindhearted and compassionate. He loves to cook and is the best cook in Nowhere Land. He lives inside a portable cardboard box.Hamilton also loves his "H" sweater. He's a loyal and best friend to Maggie and the Beast. He is just like his favorite box, everything must be in its proper place. He's also quite cautious, especially when trying new things. Often Maggie has to encourage Hamilton, and when he succeeds at some new game or activity he is known to utter a joyous "Hoo-whee!". Hamilton is a music lover and enjoys singing and dancing. He's a great chef and always wears his special chef's hat when cooking up something for Maggie and the Beast! It's implied that Hamilton has a crush on Maggie and tries to impress her by making her a balloon bouquet and writing a song about her. Hamilton has pink skin and three hairs on his head. His sweater is white with a red "H" on it and he wears an orange collar shirt underneath it. He has blue pants and white eyes with black pupils. Hamilton has appeared in every episode of Maggie and the Ferocious Beast.

characters.name: Jelly Bean Team
characters.description: TheJelly Bean Teamare aTeam of Jelly Beanswho view the magical world of Nowhere Land from an ant's-eye view. They sometimes argue among themselves, letting small differences get between them, but with some helping words fromMaggiethey always manage to remember that they are theJelly Bean Team! Just imagine how truly gigantic theFerocious Beastmust seem to Nowhere Land's smallest candy-coated characters, theJelly Bean Team. They are all good friends withMaggie, theBeast,Hamilton, and almost everyone in Nowhere Land. EachJelly Beanin TheJelly Bean Teamis the different colours, but two of them are green, with two different hats. The only girlJelly Beanis Purple. She is the only one with no hat. One is green with a bobble hat coloured a light shade of green.  AnotherJelly Beanis green with a green cap. A yellowJelly Beanis dressed like a cowboy (with a cowboy hat). An orangeJelly Beanwears a railroad hat. A redJelly Beanwears a propeller hat. The last member of theJelly Bean Teamis black. He has a white sailors hat. TheJelly Bean Teamhave appeared in many episodes of Maggie and the Ferocious Beast. Their first appearance was inWhat's in the Bag?.Their final appearance was onUnited Airlines Flight 175.

characters.name: Kindly Giant
characters.description: Kindly Giant Kindly Giant is a really tall character in the show. He is much taller and bigger than Beast and Big Duck. He has really large feet. He appears in many episodes in the show. He is such a kind, happy, really gentle and really helpful character that he is friends with all the characters in the show. He can scoop most likely all the characters up in his large hands, most likely even Beast. He thinks Maggie's baby triplet cousins are really cute. When he walks, ground near him shakes so much that others can hardly keep their balance and it's easy to tell when he is coming, since ground rumbles really loudly like a thunder. He wears a red shirt, blue pants and brown sandals. He looks like a human, but much bigger. His face is never shown, probably because of his massive size. Kindly Giant is really wise and he gives good advice to Maggie and his friends. He has a farm, where all vegetables and fruits are massive. He always lets everyone to take his vegetables and fruits when they need them. Kindly Giant is largest resident in Nowhere land. Although his face has never shown, he probably wears a green hat, because it has been showed on an episode.

characters.name: Koala Twins
characters.description: Koala Twins are the brother and sister who live in Nowhere Land. Koalas are fucking horrible animals. They have one of the smallest brain to body ratios of any mammal, additionally - their brains are smooth. A brain is folded to increase the surface area for neurons. If you present a koala with leaves plucked from a branch, laid on a flat surface, the koala will not recognise it as food. They are too thick to adapt their feeding behaviour to cope with change. In a room full of potential food, they can literally starve to death. This is not the token of an animal that is winning at life. Speaking of stupidity and food, one of the likely reasons for their primitive brains is the fact that additionally to being poisonous, eucalyptus leaves (the only thing they eat) have almost no nutritional value. They can't afford the extra energy to think, they sleep more than 80% of their fucking lives. When they are awake all they do is eat, shit and occasionally scream like fucking satan. Because eucalyptus leaves hold such little nutritional value, koalas have to ferment the leaves in their guts for days on end. Unlike their brains, they have the largest hind gut to body ratio of any mammal. Many herbivorous mammals have adaptations to cope with harsh plant life taking its toll on their teeth, rodents for instance have teeth that never stop growing, some animals only have teeth on their lower jaw, grinding plant matter on bony plates in the tops of their mouths, others have enlarged molars that distribute the wear and break down plant matter more efficiently... Koalas are no exception, when their teeth erode down to nothing, they resolve the situation by starving to death, because they're fucking terrible animals. Being mammals, koalas raise their joeys on milk (admittedly, one of the lowest milk yields to body ratio... There's a trend here). When the young joey needs to transition from rich, nourishing substances like milk, to eucalyptus (a plant that seems to be making it abundantly clear that it doesn't want to be eaten), it finds it does not have the necessary gut flora to digest the leaves. To remedy this, the young joey begins nuzzling its mother's anus until she leaks a little diarrhoea (actually fecal pap, slightly less digested), which he then proceeds to slurp on. This partially digested plant matter gives him just what he needs to start developing his digestive system. Of course, he may not even have needed to bother nuzzling his mother. She may have been suffering from incontinence. Why? Because koalas are riddled with chlamydia. In some areas the infection rate is 80% or higher. This statistic isn't helped by the fact that one of the few other activities koalas will spend their precious energy on is rape. Despite being seasonal breeders, males seem to either not know or care, and will simply overpower a female regardless of whether she is ovulating. If she fights back, he may drag them both out of the tree, which brings us full circle back to the

characters.name: Maggie
characters.description: Maggie(voiced by Canada-based actressKristen Bone) is one of the three main protagonists of Teletoon/Nick Jr'sMaggie and the Ferocious Beast. She is a redheaded 5-year-old girl (who later turns 6 years old) [citation needed] and the human protagonist of the show. She’s Hamilton's and Beast's best friend, who’s very adventurous. Maggie is an artist, and her palette is the world trade centre! She has drawn the map of Nowhere Land directly from her own imagination, as a place for her beloved friends, Hamilton and the Beast to live. Maggie loves color. If Maggie had a favourite colour, it would be a 5-year-old girl who is a best friend to both Hamilton and the Beast. Maggie is looked up to by them very much and is looked to for advice and guidance throughout many of the situations they encounter. Maggie is the voice of reason among us and also acts as a leader. She’s compassionate, kindhearted and considerate to their feelings.

characters.name: Millicent, Mavis and Marge
characters.description: Millicent, Mavis and MargeakaThe Moo Sistersare three cows who love to sing. Their favorite tune is "Moo River"! Harmony is important to the Moo Sisters, both in song and life. Each sister wears a cowbell that rings in a different key. They are voiced by Emily Scott, Tamara Bernier and Ellen-Ray Hennessy. Each Moo sister is white with many black spots shaped like music notes. They have big pink noses and two gray horns on each of their heads. The Moo Sisters have green eyes and gold cowbells. This is how Shay looks.

characters.name: Mother Whale
characters.description: Mother Whaleis a big purple whale only appearing in the Season 3 episode "The Beached Whale". She is the mother of the Baby Whale. As stated above, she only appeared in "The Beached Whale" with no dialogue.
